fields.name: info
fields.fieldText: Input the Corresponding Pay Code below, then in the next screen Validate the Pay & Invoice Amount from the Pay Code's Assignment Rate

validationRule.errorMessage: Entry date cannot be earlier than assignment start date ({!Get_Assignment.tc9_pr__Assignment_Start_Date__c})

fields.name: success
fields.fieldText: The Pay Transaction has been successfully created.

fields.name: PTIX_ID
fields.fieldText:
ID: {!varPayTransaction.Id}


Pay Transaction Name: {!Get_Ptix_Created.Name}

Quantity: {!Get_Ptix_Created.tc9_pr__Quantity__c}

Pay Total: {!Get_Ptix_Created.tc9_pr__Pay_Total__c}

Invoice Total Inc. Tax: {!Get_Ptix_Created.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Inc_Tax__c}

fields.name: success_0
fields.fieldText: The Pay Transaction(s) have been successfully updated

fields.name: dt_1
fields.fieldText:
ERROR


Corresponding Record Type for Pay Transaction not found for Pay Code record type of: {!get_pay_code.RecordType.Name}


Please contact your administrator.

fields.name: dt_edit_ViewOnly
fields.fieldText:
VIEW ONLY - This Transaction Has Been Paid


Transactions


Pay Transaction Name: {!Loop_PTIX.Name}

Pay Transaction Type: {!Loop_PTIX.RecordType.Name}

Entry Date: {!Transaction_Date}

Pay Code: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Code__r.Name}

Pay Amount: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Rate__c}

Invoice Amount: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Rate__c}

Quantity: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Quantity__c}

Pay Total: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Total__c}

Invoice Total Ex. Tax: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Ex_Tax__c}

Invoice Total Inc. Tax: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Inc_Tax__c}

Description: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Description__c}

fields.name: Edit_PTIX_Header
fields.fieldText:
EDIT PAY TRANSACTIONS


Please be aware some fields are READ ONLY


Pay Transaction Name: {!Loop_PTIX.Name}

﻿Pay Transaction Type: {!Loop_PTIX.RecordType.Name}

Entry Date: {!Transaction_Date}

Pay Code: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Code__r.Name}

Pay Amount: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Rate__c}

Invoice Amount: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Rate__c}

﻿Quantity: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Quantity__c}


Pay Total: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Total__c}

Invoice Total Ex. Tax: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Ex_Tax__c}

Invoice Total Inc. Tax: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Inc_Tax__c}

fields.name: Confirmation_Screen
fields.fieldText:
EDIT PAY TRANSACTIONS


Please Confirm the Updated Pay & Invoice Amounts and Quantity



Pay Transaction Name: {!edit_Pay_Transaction_Name}


Pay Amount: {!edit_Pay_Amount}

Invoice Amount: {!edit_Invoice_Amount}

Quantity: {!edit_Quantity}

Description: {!sel_PTIX_Descr}

fields.name: dt_edit_ViewOnly_0
fields.fieldText:
VIEW ONLY - This Transaction Has Been Paid


Pay Transaction Name: {!Loop_PTIX.Name}

Pay Transaction Type: {!Loop_PTIX.RecordType.Name}

Entry Date: {!Transaction_Date}

Pay Code: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Code__r.Name}

Pay Amount: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Rate__c}

Invoice Amount: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Rate__c}

Quantity: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Quantity__c}

Pay Total: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Pay_Total__c}

Invoice Total Ex. Tax: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Ex_Tax__c}

Invoice Total Inc. Tax: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_et__Invoice_Total_Inc_Tax__c}

Description: {!Loop_PTIX.tc9_pr__Description__c}

fields.name: dt_edit_ViewOnly_0_0
fields.fieldText: No Transactions for the Date Entered

validationRule.errorMessage: Transaction Date cannot be earlier than assignment start date ({!Get_Assignment.tc9_pr__Assignment_Start_Date__c})
